name: think
description: Internal reasoning tool. Use this to think through a problem before acting — plan next steps, analyze gathered data, weigh alternatives, or synthesize information from multiple sources. Returns a reasoning string.

question.description: What you need to think about. Be specific — e.g. 'Which of these 3 API endpoints should I call next given the task requirements?'

context.description: Relevant information gathered so far — tool results, task description, constraints, partial answers. Include everything the reasoning needs.
